{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/tags/0.0.0/assets/cubyz/blocks/textures/baobab_planks.png
|durability=20
|mass_damage=0.8
|hardness_damage=0.8
|swing_speed=4.2
|tags=wood
|modifiers=durable
}}
== Properties ==
{{Stub|section}}

== Obtaining ==
{{Stub|section}}
4 can be obtained per [[Baobab Log]] or 2 per [[Baobab Branch]] via the crafting menu.

== Usage ==
{{Stub|section}}
Baobab Planks can be used to create Baobab themed wooden block such as:

* [[Baobab Fence]]
* [[Baobab Sign]]
* [[Baobab Chest]]

and can act like any other wooden planks when crafting a:

* [[Torch]]
* [[Workbench]]

== History ==

* [[0.0.0]] - Added to the game

== Trivia ==
{{Stub|section}}

[[Category:Blocks]]
[[Category:Materials]]
[[Category:Planks]]
